caption:
The lecture hall was stifling today, but not because of the weather. No, it was the weight of twenty pairs of hungry eyes fixed on me as I paced the front of the room. I adjusted the collar of my crisp white silk blouse, feeling the fabric stretch snugly against my heavy chest. It wasn’t tight enough to spill, just enough to hint at the fullness that had my grad students whispering during the break. My high-waisted tweed skirt hugged my hips perfectly, elongating my legs and hiding the curve of my butt in a sophisticated silhouette that screamed 'academic chic' but whispered 'come and find out'.

I turned to write on the whiteboard, feeling the silk pull across my back. When I turned back, I caught Professor Halloway staring. He wasn’t looking at my face; he was looking lower, his gaze tracing the line of my blouse. I smiled, a slow, deliberate curve of my lips, and tucked a strand of hair behind my ear. 

'Now, as we discuss the dynamics of power in Victorian literature,' I purred, my voice dropping an octave, 'consider the woman who holds the book, and the man who holds the room.' I took a step closer to the front row, the scent of my vanilla perfume cutting through the stale air. I saw the shift in their posture, the way their eyes darkened. It wasn’t just about the lecture anymore; it was about the tension, the unspoken promise of something more intimate behind the closed library doors. I tapped my pen against the podium, watching them hold their breath. Who would dare to ask me to stay after class? 📚✨💋

#UniversityLife #TeacherGoals #AcademicChic #SexyProf #SilkBlouse #TweedSkirt #LectureHallVibes #FacultyLove
